issue.title: Broad repo Python reduction sweep AB

blocker.summary: No pull request exists for BIG-GO-188, and this environment has no authenticated GitHub CLI session to create one automatically.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the repo-root control metadata surface.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
No BIG-GO-188 record exists in local-issues.json in this workspace, so durable lane completion evidence lives in the committed branch artifacts.
After fetching on 2026-04-09, the branch remained current with origin/main and required no rebase.
Public GitHub API query for pulls with head OpenAGIs:BIG-GO-188 returned an empty list.
